author: kevin.monteiro@eastbridgehigh.org
body: Great overview. Should we add the work-to-rule escalation timeline here? Members keep asking about the conditions.

author: t.sullivan@eastbridgehigh.org
body: Agreed with Kevin. Also suggest adding the school committee meeting dates so members can show up and speak.

author: k.monteiro@eastbridgehigh.org
body: Period 2 students have been struggling with the contextualization paragraph. Could we add a sample intro paragraph here?

author: n.ford@bps.edu
body: Good unit map. Please add the midterm exam dates when you have them finalized so I can include in dept calendar.

author: t.gaines@bps.edu
body: Two of my students need IEP accommodations on the trip. I will send you their plans so chaperones are informed.

author: d.wright@bps.edu
body: Loving the addition of the Freedmen Bureau documents. Any chance we could use some of these in a cross-department unit?

author: a.perez@eastbridgehigh.org
body: 38 votes on compensation is telling. We should use this prominently in the opening statement to the committee.

author: k.monteiro@eastbridgehigh.org
body: The 54th Mass letters are a great addition. I used something similar in my World History unit and students loved them.

author: n.ford@bps.edu
body: I will reach out to the principal today about this. Keep the documentation tight and specific. Good work David.

author: t.sullivan@eastbridgehigh.org
body: The member spotlight on Kevin is great. Could we also mention the successful April rally turnout in the contract update section?

author: k.monteiro@eastbridgehigh.org
body: The Pullman Strike documents are excellent. Want me to share the primary source I use on Eugene Debs for the unit?

author: e.martinez@eastbridgehigh.org
body: Cross-posting from Math department: our students could benefit from the propaganda poster analysis technique for media literacy unit.

author: m.wilson@eastbridgehigh.org
body: The Article 8 grievance resolution sets a good precedent. Should we document the resolution terms explicitly for future cases?

author: j.costa@eastbridgehigh.org
body: Can we add a section for faculty who want to do cross-disciplinary projects with History Club? I have a biology-history idea for the Gettysburg trip.

author: a.perez@eastbridgehigh.org
body: The new member packet is really clear. I gave it to Sandra Franklin this week when she joined. She appreciated the building rep contact info.

author: n.ford@bps.edu
body: 48 hours is well above the 30-hour minimum. Good work this year David. Please have certificates uploaded by June 20 for HR processing.

author: p.bhatt@eastbridgehigh.org
body: The Canvas setup guide is really helpful for new teachers. Could we share it in the new teacher orientation folder too?

author: d.wright@bps.edu
body: Do you need a research methods mini-lesson for students? I could bring in a brief source evaluation activity for your first research session.

author: t.sullivan@eastbridgehigh.org
body: The chapter meetings on first Thursdays have been working well this year. Should we lock in the same schedule for next year in this page?

author: m.wilson@eastbridgehigh.org
body: The Ida Tarbell documents are excellent. Standard Oil is a great anchor text for teaching monopoly power and muckraking together.
